data_description.port: The integration will default to 8050, if not set, which should be suitable for most installs
data_description.update_interval: The interval in seconds between updates. Default is 15 seconds. Setting this to a lower value may cause increased load on the microinverter and your network.
data_description.base_produced_p1: Compensation of microinverter fault to reset 0 after around 24xkWh. This is for Port 1
data_description.base_produced_p2: Compensation overflow fault around 240-250kWh. Will be added to the base produced value to prevent this. This is for Port 2
data_description.use_api_v2: Whether to use API v2, which is supported by newer microinverter firmware versions (v1.9.0 and later). If your microinverter supports API v2, it is recommended to enable this option.

reconfigure.description: The device can be reconfigured. Previous data is seen in dialog.
reconfigure.title: Reload configuration
